figure_prompt: A blue-robed mage standing on a moonlit observatory terrace, right hand raised palm-out (the open-hand symbol of Honesty), a brilliant sapphire-blue gem clasped in the left hand emanating clear light, twin moons over a calm sea beyond, an open scroll on a lectern nearby, the mantra AHM carved in stone-letters on a tablet at the figure's feet

A paladin kneeling at dawn before the gates of a golden walled city, sword reversed and planted point-down, both gauntleted hands cupped around a golden chalice set with a purple amethyst (the chalice-symbol of Honor), a white banner bearing an ankh stirring behind.
